title: Evangelion Web Browser Game
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Web Browser Game             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Oct 05, 2011 10:48 am It seems that there is an announcement that a web browser game based on the Rebuild films is in production. Here is the article: [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2011-10-05/new-evangelion-films-to-get-pc-browser-game-in-2012[/url] Since I am a complete and utter idiot when it come to computer games and video games in general, my question is when they say it's a web browser game, do they mean something online such as the Lord of the Rings online game?

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Wed Oct 05, 2011 12:44 pm It's probably one of those online games you play from inside your browser, like Quake Live .

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Oct 05, 2011 4:14 pm I wonder if this will only be available in Japan or will it spread.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Oct 05, 2011 4:37 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: I wonder if this will only be available in Japan or will it spread.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 06, 2011 1:04 pm They have made some Pachinko games for PS3 and there was that Misato News Service awhile back. If you mean a regular PS3 game, I'm sure it'll be a matter of time. (Same with PS Vita.) The cash cow needs to stay milked somehow. As for this browser game, I hope it won't suck. I'm somewhat interested in it. I guess it would only be based on 1.0 and 2.0 but still.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Oct 07, 2011 3:55 pm Misato wrote: Would they just make a PS3 game already .

[]:             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Sun Oct 09, 2011 1:25 pm I hope this is localized.........

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Oct 09, 2011 4:13 pm It won't be.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Oct 09, 2011 5:28 pm AuraTwilight, always such a downer. (

[]:             Quote Post by Nivek » Sun Oct 09, 2011 8:21 pm It will be a sims-style game. Only, after you spend 67867897 hours building your city, you will have the pleasure of sitting and watching it get destroyed in an angel attack.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sun Oct 09, 2011 11:07 pm Nivek wrote: It will be a sims-style game. Only, after you spend 67867897 hours building your city, you will have the pleasure of sitting and watching it get destroyed in an angel attack.

[]:             Quote Post by Nivek » Thu Oct 13, 2011 5:24 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: that's well over a hundred years

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 02, 2012 9:59 am I wonder whatever came out of this? Was it abandoned or it'll be released later this year? Not like people that aren't in Japan would have a real means of playing it but still.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Nov 02, 2012 11:06 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I wonder whatever came out of this? Was it abandoned or it'll be released later this year? Not like people that aren't in Japan would have a real means of playing it but still.

Here is the article: [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2011-10-05/new-evangelion-films-to-get-pc-browser-game-in-2012[/url] Since I am a complete and utter idiot when it come to computer games and video games in general, my question is when they say it's a web browser game, do they mean something online such as the Lord of the Rings online game?
